creator: cmt@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 165243
update thunderbird ports to 38.5.1

https://www.mozilla.org/en-US/thunderbird/38.5.1/releasenotes/
The release notes report a release date of december 28th, but the source code only became available yesterday.
Attached patch updates thunderbird, thunderbird-i18n and linux-thunderbird.
The embedded Lightning got bumped, too.
